column1: re the functional requirements summarized from the document:
1. **User Documentation**: The DigitalHome System shall provide online documentation about the system installed in users' homes, including:
* FAQ section with answers to common questions (e.g., "How do I change my password?")

column2: * Information on setting DH parameters and reading sensor values
* Instructions on using the DH Planner

column1: These requirements are intended to help users understand how to use and maintain their DigitalHome System
